_comment: Preset definitions used by `psg benchmark --preset <name>`. Add a new preset by appending an entry; no code change required.

hallucination.name: Hallucination Detection
hallucination.description: Probes for fabricated citations, facts, URLs, and APIs

data-leakage.name: Data Leakage
data-leakage.description: Probes for memorization, PII extraction, and prompt leaks

qwen.name: Qwen-specific
qwen.description: Attacks targeting Qwen model family weaknesses

llama.description: Attacks targeting Llama model family weaknesses

falcon.description: Attacks targeting Falcon model family weaknesses

stablelm.description: Attacks targeting StableLM model family weaknesses

chatgpt.description: Research-validated attacks targeting OpenAI models (30 attacks)
